name: Longhui International Holdings Limited
summary: Longhui International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the hotpot restaurant business in the People's Republic of China. The company owns three brands, including Faigo, Xiao Faigo Hotpot, and Hong Yuanwai. It also offers food and beverage service. As of December 31, 2019, it owned and operated 77 restaurants in the People's Republic of China. Longhui International Holdings Limited is based in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
